title: Transitions in development - an interview with Maria Almuedo-Castillo.
abstract: Maria Almuedo-Castillo is a Junior Group Leader at the Andalusian Center for Development Biology (CABD). Maria's group studies how mechanical forces are translated into the gene regulatory signals that impact a cell. We spoke to Maria over Teams to learn more about her early-career research, her transition into being a group leader, and her insights into navigating the academic profession.
